title: Tyumen、Tyumen Oblast — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]

概述

Tyumen是Tyumen Oblast的一个城市，人口约820,000。The first Russian city in Siberia, now a wealthy oil and gas hub with a high standard of living and modern urban development.
